title: rhamnus hemsleyana var. hemsleyana
intro: Rhamnus hemsleyana var. hemsleyana, also known as Chinese buckthorn, is a deciduous shrub native to China, characterized by its thorny branches and small, yellowish-green flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chinese buckthorn include improving cardiovascular health, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting liver function. It is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, with herbal preparations often involving the bark and leaves of the plant.
